+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kube-rs-577-add-backoff-to-watcher-reconnection",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kube-rs: Add backoff to watcher reconnection",
+    "description": "Add backoff to watcher reconnection. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check kube-rs project setup",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kube-rs deployment:\n```bash\ncargo --version\nrustc --version\ngrep kube Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null\n```\nCheck the kube-rs dependency version in your Rust project."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-rs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-rs configuration:\n```bash\ngrep -A5 '\\[dependencies\\]' Cargo.toml\ncargo tree | grep kube\n```\nCurrently `watcher` will always keep a reconnection attempt in-flight when polled (and there is no active connection already). That's a bit excessive, and pretty unkind to the apiserver."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add backoff to watcher reconnection",
+        "description": "First moves the imports of `kube_runtime` reflector around a bit first as per comments in https://github.com/kube-rs/kube-rs/issues/577 (https://github.com/kube-rs/kube-rs/issues/577#issuecomment-958974973):\n\n- `runtime::reflector` module renamed to `runtime::cache` module\n- `store` module within `cache` made private, but re-exporting `Writer` (as well) from the module\n\nThen we add a slightly more ergonomic builder struct `Cache<K>` that wraps `reflector`.\nThis encapsulates the `Writer` and\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Add backoff to watcher reconnection is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\ncargo build 2>&1 | tail -20\ncargo test 2>&1 | tail -20\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "First moves the imports of `kube_runtime` reflector around a bit first as per comments in https://github.com/kube-rs/kube-rs/issues/577 (https://github.com/kube-rs/kube-rs/issues/577#issuecomment-958974973):\n\n- `runtime::reflector` module renamed to `runtime::cache` module\n- `store` module within `cache` made private, but re-exporting `Writer` (as well) from the module\n\nThen we add a slightly",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
